text:
- [escalation] Andy: Newsletter from Andrew Lang (brother) about making care visible.
- [escalation] Sir Richard: Forwarded message from Rich Lang (father) about Alison's note regarding Erin's show.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Bug report Greg Gorsuch reporting website issues with broken button and navigation problems.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests a text edit changing 'human' to 'our' in a specific line.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch proposes changing popups to hyperlinked pages if popups cannot be edited.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch approves the 'what' page format and requests navigation and layout changes.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests moving the vg page inside performances and adjusting the CG logo color.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch reports popup sizing issues on the first page where content is cut off.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley confirming a Zoom meeting for Saturday morning at 10am Pacific Daylight Time.
- [no action] lang.mc+cc@gmail.com: Daily brief email with a note about investigating a PrivadoVPN password reset request.
- [no action] noreply-ngc@nvidia.com: NVIDIA notification about NGC API paths retiring on September 30, 2026.
